title: Review framework per-project config
description: Targets the generic review plugin to a specific repo. Place at .claude/review.config.json. Anything omitted falls back to DEFAULT_CONFIG in scripts/review/config.ts.

persona.description: Voice/flavor toggle for reviewer agents that support it (e.g. scavenger). 'twitch' = themed Twitch plague-rat voice; 'plain' = neutral prose. Substance (verdict/findings) is identical either way.

base.description: Git base ref for the cumulative diff. Defaults to the branch upstream, else origin/main.

secretAllowlist.description: Extra markers (matched against the secret VALUE) that suppress secret-scan false positives.

name.description: Reviewer id. The 5 built-ins are conventions, architecture, tests, docs, security; others are appended.

zones.description: Globs this agent restricts its review to.

skills.description: Skill ids the agent loads (encode the project's rules).

extensionSkill.description: Optional prose skill for rules too complex for config fields (the escape hatch).

pattern.description: Regex grepped across changed files in zones.

code.description: Glob; when a changed path matches it, the doc must also change.
